state diagram:
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> InitialState
  InitialState --> WaitingState: CoinEvent
  PouringState --> InitialState: DoneEvent
  WaitingState --> InitialState: DoneEvent
  WaitingState --> PouringState: ButtonEvent
  WaitingState --> WaitingState: CoinEvent
```
transition from=<nil> to=main.InitialState event=<nil>
scenario: basic (pouring water)
transition from=main.InitialState to=main.WaitingState event=1
coin count=1
transition from=main.WaitingState to=main.PouringState event=&{water}
pouring item=water
transition from=main.PouringState to=main.InitialState event=done
---
scenario: basic (pouring coffee)
transition from=main.InitialState to=main.WaitingState event=1
coin count=1
transition from=main.WaitingState to=main.WaitingState event=2
coin count=2
transition from=main.WaitingState to=main.PouringState event=&{coffee}
pouring item=coffee
transition from=main.PouringState to=main.InitialState event=done
---
scenario: insufficient coins and cancel
transition from=main.InitialState to=main.WaitingState event=1
coin count=1
insufficient coins error="2 coin(s) for coffee, but 1"
transition from=main.WaitingState to=main.InitialState event=cancel
---
scenario: timeout
transition from=main.InitialState to=main.WaitingState event=1
coin count=1
transition from=main.WaitingState to=main.InitialState event=timeout
